items.headline: Western Conference Finals Go to Game 7 Tonight!
items.summary: The San Antonio Spurs' dominant Game 6 victory over the Oklahoma City Thunder has forced a winner-take-all Game 7 tonight, May 30th, to decide who will face the New York Knicks in the NBA Finals.

items.headline: Thunder's Jalen Williams OUT for Crucial Game 7
items.summary: Oklahoma City Thunder star wing Jalen Williams will miss tonight's pivotal Game 7 against the Spurs due to a left hamstring strain, a significant blow for the defending champions.

items.headline: Mitchell Robinson Undergoes Finger Surgery, Determined for Finals Return
items.summary: Knicks center Mitchell Robinson had surgery for a fractured pinkie finger on his right hand but is reportedly 'gung ho' on playing in the upcoming NBA Finals, which begin June 3rd.

items.headline: Deni Avdija Honored as 'Jerusalem Ambassador in the Diaspora'
items.summary: Israeli NBA star Deni Avdija was presented with the 'Jerusalem Ambassador in the Diaspora' award in New York City on Thursday, recognized for proudly representing Israel as a public figure.

items.headline: Spurs Dominate Thunder to Force Game 7!
items.summary: The San Antonio Spurs routed the Oklahoma City Thunder in Game 6 of the Western Conference Finals, forcing a decisive Game 7. Victor Wembanyama led the charge with a stellar performance.

items.headline: Wemby Forces Game 7 with Dominant Outing
items.summary: Spurs rookie sensation Victor Wembanyama was spectacular in Game 6, tallying 28 points, 10 rebounds, and 3 blocks to lead San Antonio to victory. He joins Spurs legends David Robinson and Tim Duncan with five 25-10 playoff games.

items.headline: Spurs' Young Guns Step Up in Game 6
items.summary: Dylan Harper contributed 18 points, while Stephon Castle added 17 points for the Spurs, providing crucial offensive support in their Game 6 win.

items.headline: SGA's MVP-Caliber Season
items.summary: Despite a quiet Game 6 with 15 points, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander finished the season averaging an impressive 31.1 points and 6.6 assists, a key reason for OKC's top seed.

items.headline: Tonight: Thunder vs. Spurs Game 7 - Battle for the Finals!
items.summary: The Oklahoma City Thunder and San Antonio Spurs will clash tonight in Oklahoma City for a decisive Game 7, with the winner advancing to face the New York Knicks in the NBA Finals. Tip-off is 8:00 PM ET.

items.headline: Giannis Antetokounmpo Trade Speculation Heats Up
items.summary: Reports indicate the Milwaukee Bucks considered trading Giannis Antetokounmpo to the Miami Heat at the 2026 trade deadline, and other teams like Orlando, Golden State, Cleveland, and Philadelphia are expected to pursue the two-time MVP.

items.headline: Terry Rozier Faces New Bribery Charges in Gambling Sting
items.summary: Former Miami Heat guard Terry Rozier has been hit with additional federal charges, accused of accepting a $100,000 bribe to exit a game early in 2023 as part of a sports gambling scheme.

items.headline: Kyrie Irving Provides Positive ACL Injury Update
items.summary: Dallas Mavericks star Kyrie Irving, who missed the entire 2025-26 season after tearing his ACL in March 2025, shared a positive update on his recovery, stating he is 'definitely close to being over at 100%'.
